# well-known-walker

> Paste any domain, see every Kinetic Gain disclosure it publishes.

Client-side parallel probe of every Kinetic Gain /.well-known/ URL on a target domain. Reports per-spec status: FOUND / not_found / CORS_blocked / parse_error / network_error, plus a procurement-grade summary (entity identity, claim count, policy scope, incident count, audit mode). No backend; all fetches run in your browser.

## Identity

- **Subdomain**: [walker.kineticgain.com](https://walker.kineticgain.com/)
- **Spec repo**: [github.com/mizcausevic-dev/well-known-walker-web](https://github.com/mizcausevic-dev/well-known-walker-web)
- **Buyer audience**: Procurement / Risk reviewers · CISOs auditing vendors
- **Category**: Tool — disclosure discovery
- **License**: AGPL-3.0 for spec text; Apache-2.0 for the landing site
- **Deployment**: GitHub Actions FTP CI/CD on push to main

## Pages

- [/](https://walker.kineticgain.com/): well-known-walker — Paste any domain, see every Kinetic Gain disclosure it publishes.

## Part of the Kinetic Gain Protocol Suite

A family of **10 open JSON specifications** for the answer-engine and agent era — five core (AEO, Prompt Provenance, Agent Cards, AI Evidence Format, MCP Tool Cards), a three-spec EdTech trio (Tutor Cards / Student AI Disclosure / Classroom AI AUP), a HealthTech extension (Clinical AI Disclosure), and a cross-cutting Incident Card. **Two regulated verticals covered.**

- **Front door**: [suite.kineticgain.com](https://suite.kineticgain.com/)
- **Quickstart hub**: [docs.kineticgain.com](https://docs.kineticgain.com/)
- **Unified MCP server** (34 tools, 8 specs, v0.4.0): [github.com/mizcausevic-dev/mcp-kinetic-gain](https://github.com/mizcausevic-dev/mcp-kinetic-gain)
- **Unified visualizer** (8 renderers): [github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-visualizer](https://github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-visualizer)
- **Meta-repo**: [github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-protocol-suite](https://github.com/mizcausevic-dev/kinetic-gain-protocol-suite)
